# `api.contacts.merge`

> `PUT /contacts/{mergeToId}/merge` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.contacts.merge(merge_to_id: str, *, data: ContactMergeRequest | dict) -> None
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab contacts merge <merge_to_id> [--data ...]
```

PUT /contacts/{mergeToId}/merge.

Args:
    merge_to_id: Target contact to merge into.
    data: Merge request payload.
        Accepts a :class:`ContactMergeRequest` instance or a dict.

Request model: :class:`ContactMergeRequest`

## Request body — `ContactMergeRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `mergeFromId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Source contact ID to merge from |

## Response

No response body.
